philippines.title: Third suspect in Bulacan board member's slay nabbed in Cavite
philippines.description:
CAMP GEN. ALEJO SANTOS, Bulacan — Police arrested on Friday in Cavite the alleged driver of one of the getaway vehicles used in the 2024 killing of Bulacan Board Member Ramil Capistrano and his driver, Shedrick Toribio. Newly installed Bulacan officer-in-charge police director Col. Jay Baybayan identified the suspect as alias “King,” 45, a resident of Monroy St., Barangay Navotas West, Navotas City. He was apprehended at around 11:00 a.m. in Barangay Marulas, Kawit. Baybayan said the suspect was cornered after nearly falling off his motorcycle when he struck one of the arresting officers’ vehicles while attempting to flee in […]...
Keep on reading: Third suspect in Bulacan board member's slay nabbed in Cavite

philippines.title: PVL: Cignal fends off Farm Fresh for winning start in semifinals
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — Cignal overcame a slow start to turn back Farm Fresh, 23-25, 25-14, 25-11, 25-12, and book its first win in the semifinal round in the 2026 PVL All-Filipino Conference on Saturday at Mall of Asia Arena.  The Super Spikers, coming off a 15-day break, fell to a rusty start and lost in the opening set, but it turned out to be the wake-up call they needed to dominate the last three. READ: PVL semifinals set stage for new All-Filipino champion Erika Santos and Vanie Gandler continued to lead the way for Cignal, while Tin Tiamzon also rose […]...
Keep on reading: PVL: Cignal fends off Farm Fresh for winning start in semifinals

philippines.title: PMA graduating cadets spread goodwill in exposure trip to Pag-Asa Island
philippines.description:
BAGUIO CITY — Another batch of Philippine Military Academy (PMA) cadets had an exposure trip to Pag-asa Island in Palawan last week, three days before the Philippine Coast Guard opened a district outpost at Kalayaan town. Graduating cadets of PMA “Talang Dangal” Class of 2026 were brought to the island for an outreach program and to engage with residents on April 6, said Navy Lt Commander Jesse Nestor Saludo, PMA chief of public affairs, in a statement on Saturday. A flashpoint for the country’s territorial dispute with China, this island community first hosted PMA cadets belonging to the “Siklab Laya” […]...
Keep on reading: PMA graduating cadets spread goodwill in exposure trip to Pag-Asa Island

energy.title: Strait of Hormuz Constraints Keep Oil Prices Elevated
energy.description: Oil prices remain close to $100 per barrel despite the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, which revived hopes that the worst oil and gas supply shock ever could begin to ease soon and bring energy prices down. While immediate escalation has been taken out of the war premium, at least as of Friday morning, the reality on the ground – and in the Strait of Hormuz – is that the vital oil and LNG chokepoint remains largely closed and traffic controlled at Iran’s discretion.    The shocking and very steep rise in oil and gas prices due…

energy.title: India’s Nuclear Bet Is Starting To Pay Off
energy.description: India has reached a milestone in its nuclear energy program through its state-of-the-art fast breeder reactor, signalling a major step forward for the clean energy transition in the world’s most populous country. The country’s most advanced nuclear reactor reached criticality earlier this month, meaning that the nuclear chain reaction powering the plant is self-sustaining. This breakthrough will ultimately allow India to import far less uranium to power its nuclear program, and can be adapted to use domestic thorium reserves for fuel…

Anyma, the Italian American DJ who makes up one-half of the EDM duo Tale of Us, was set to perform on the main stage at midnight, approximately 90 minutes after Sabrina Carpenter’s headlining set. But […]

entertainment.title: Sabrina Carpenter Headlines Coachella, Bringing Sexy Pop Hits, Old Hollywood Flare and a Bizarre Susan Sarandon Monologue to the Desert
entertainment.description: Sabrina Carpenter brought Hollywood, Broadway and a good old fashioned house party to the desert in a rollicking, raunchy and hit-filled headlining Coachella set. There were costume changes, elaborate set pieces and celebrity cameos — but no duets. (She didn’t “arrest” anyone, either, despite rumors that Madonna might be put in her signature cuffs.) Carpenter […]

entertainment.title: ‘Thrash’ Review: It’s Netflix and Chomp, as Phoebe Dynevor Stars in a Familiar but Gruesomely Competent Shark Thriller
entertainment.description: Everything in the movie, from the chomping shark attacks that churn up the splashing water with Hawaiian Punch foam to the way that a humungous great white meets her fate at the end, takes an obvious page from Steven Spielberg’s gambits and techniques. But shark movies, because of that derivative quality (and because the directors are not Spielberg), often tend to be dreary claustrophobic affairs. Whereas "Thrash" has a lively competence about it, and a touch of fluid originality in the staging.
